Your gift makes a difference

Access to quality health care is slipping out of reach for so many in San Joaquin and Solano counties.

As health insurance and other benefits are reduced, vulnerable families and hard-working people across our region are losing coverage and facing one of the most difficult moments in recent history. This is creating a ripple effect that puts thousands at risk. Now, more than ever, our community needs a lifeline.

Community Medical Centers is firm in its mission to provide comprehensive, high-quality care to every person who walks through our doors, regardless of their ability to pay.

Your gift will provide flexible, immediate support where it's needed most across our health programs. By giving once or giving monthly, you help ensure vulnerable patients continue to receive essential, life-changing care all year long. Together, we can sustain this safety net for health care and build a better future for all.

Donations are tax-deductible. Please consult with your tax accountant for information on tax deductions.

How you can help

No gift is too small CMC The Rock Capital Campaign Transformational Giving

CMC Donor Tier Program

CMC Friend
$500 – $999
  • Recognition in the CMC Annual Report
  • Quarterly e-newsletter updates
Donate
CMC Champion
$1,000 – $2,499
  • All CMC Friend benefits
  • Invitation to CMC Signature Event
  • Recognition on CMC website
Donate
CMC Partner
$2,500+
  • All CMC Champion benefits
  • VIP reception invitation
  • Name recognition at Signature Event
  • Personal update from CMC leadership
Donate

Choose Beneficiary Program

  • CMC The Rock — Programs for teens & young adults
  • Care for Unhoused — Families and individuals experiencing homelessness
  • CareLink Mobile — Mobile health clinic services
  • Aging Adults — Specialized care for older community members
  • Children & Youth — Pediatric and developmental care
  • Uninsured Families — Care regardless of ability to pay
  • General Operating — Sustain all CMC programs and services

Giving by Check

Checks can be made payable to Community Medical Centers and mailed to:

Community Medical Centers
Attn: Development Department
7210 Murray Drive
Stockton, CA 95210

Please include any designation or instructions with your gift so we can ensure it supports the area most meaningful to you.

Signature Event

We are grateful to everyone who made this year's event possible. Your support helps expand access to care and strengthens the health of our community. Special thanks to our gala sponsors:

Opal

  • Merino Computer Concepts
  • University of the Pacific | Health Sciences

Pearl

  • AllCare IPA
  • Cambridge Investments/Nationwide
  • Health Plan of San Joaquin
  • USI Insurance Services
  • WMB Architects

Onyx

  • Bank of Stockton
  • EM Consulting
  • F&M Bank
  • Health Net
  • Medi-Tek, Inc.
  • Patterson Dental
  • Quest Diagnostics
  • Touro University
  • Wipfli

Transformational Giving

Transformational gifts help Community Medical Centers expand access to care, strengthen services, and invest in the future health of our communities. Major gifts and planned gifts—such as bequests, beneficiary designations, and other legacy gifts—can make a lasting difference for patients and families across the communities we serve.

To learn more about making a major or planned gift, contact Director of Development Jennie Rodriguez at jrmoore@cmcenters.org or (209) 373-2454.

For Stockton Residents

Mobile Community Response: In partnership with the City of Stockton, Community Medical Centers offers an alternative to 911 for Stockton citizens in need of behavioral health services. If you or someone you know is experiencing mental distress, please call (833) 311-2273, 7 days a week, 8:00 am to 11:00 pm. This helpline is for non-violent individuals with mild to moderate symptoms.
